description: Scope discipline corrections. Over-engineering prevention, minimal diff, file creation guards.

corrections.what_went_wrong: Made changes beyond what was requested — added features, refactored unrelated code, 'improved' things that weren't asked for
corrections.correct_approach: Do exactly what was asked. Don't add error handling for impossible cases, don't refactor adjacent code, don't add comments to unchanged functions. Minimal diff.
corrections.detection: Changes to files or functions not mentioned in the request

corrections.what_went_wrong: Created new files when editing existing ones would have been better
corrections.correct_approach: Prefer editing existing files. Only create new files when the functionality truly doesn't belong in any existing file.
corrections.detection: File creation — ask 'does this belong in an existing file?'
